title: Reference
description: Phenomenon whose values for specific properties are known and understood with an Uncertainty significantly lower (quantify?) than that of the Observation with which it is compared.

definitions.definition: Phenomenon whose values for specific properties are known and understood with an Uncertainty significantly lower (quantify?) than that of the Observation with which it is compared.
Sort of data acquired with an Uncertainty significantly lower (quantify?) than that of the data it is being compared with.
